take oral medications. 00 = Able to independently take the correct oral medication(s) and proper dosage(s) at the correct times.
01 = Able to take medication(s) at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in advance by another person; OR (b) given daily reminders; OR (c) someone develops a drug diary or chart.
02 = Unable to take medication unless administered by someone else.
NA = NA - No oral medications prescribed.
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
